name: Update eco news with valid data -- @1.1
fullName: Update Eco News: Update eco news with valid data

steps.name: Given I am an authorized user
When I send PUT request to update eco news with id "32" and payload:
Then the response status code should 200
And the response should match schema eco_news

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {"id":"32","source":"https://example.org","shortInfo":"Climate change update","tags":["news","events"],"title":"Climate change update","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Climate News","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Full article text here","languageCode":"en"}}
